title: Manning's Equation for Open Channel Flow Capacity
content: Manning's equation gives mean flow velocity in a prismatic open channel: V = (1/n)·R^(2/3)·S^(1/2), where n is the Manning roughness coefficient (0.011 concrete, 0.025 excavated earth), R is hydraulic radius (A/P, area/wetted perimeter in metres), and S is longitudinal channel slope (m/m). Volumetric flow Q = V·A. Used to size storm drains so design-storm runoff is conveyed without surcharging.
